name: Fasting-mimicking diet autophagic flux pilot
summary: An 8-day pilot randomized clinical trial comparing two fasting-mimicking diet formulations with control in healthy adults.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Autophagy Induction because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and mechanistic endpoints in Healthy human participants. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
